review_text:
Michelle at Tatt2Away Austin is a competent and kind technician with a great sense of humor! She has had 25 years of experience previously as an aesthetician, and brings her valuable insights to the process. She makes the process accessible and answers your questions without making you feel dumb, and adds a touch of humor where she can. Plus, she is so kind to make sure that your comfort is her top priority! I can say with confidence that you will be in great hands with her. :-) I highly recommend her!

Edit, Dec 2025:

I also have been treated by the new technician, Tatyana, who is very kind and knowledgeable about aesthetician work. She was trained by Michelle (who has been promoted) and she is excellent, now running this Austin location. Tatyana was thoughtful about my needs during the procedure and did it without wasting time and did it well.

You will be in great hands with her!

Tatyana and Michelle are fabulous! Very caring and compassionate and friendly! They have truly walked me through the process, setting expectations with the healing process and have been very kind throughout everything! I am pleased with the results so far and looking forward to the end result!

Tatiana is the best! She has made me feel so safe and calm during my removal process. I am halfway through and super pleased with the results so far. I am so thankful to have found her to do my Tatt2away.
Tatiana is fabulous! Expert level knowledge. Amazing personality. I’d give 10 stars if I could. Way better than laser ;)
Needed to fade a few spots in preparation for new coverup patterns and Tatt2Away process definitely helped to achieve my goal
Great service!!
Tatiana was awesome, very helpful and very respectful. She did a great job and she did it in perfect time. Very friendly.

It has been such a pleasure working with Tatiana! She has been an absolute answer to my tattoo removal prayers! From her knowledge of the Tatt2Away removal process and answering of questions about treatment and post treatment care, to her deliverance of phenomenal tattoo removal results, she has been an absolute gem to work with along the entire way! I highly highly recommend choosing Tatt2Away for an affordable, pain-free, worry-free and hassle-free tattoo removal solution and experience! I am truly glad that I chose this service! Thank you so much Tatiana for your friendless, professionalism and the great work that you have done!
Tatiana did a phenomenal job on my tattoo removal. Friendly and would definitely recommend to anyone looking for the same.

I wanted to love this process, but unfortunately ended up with permanent scarring and a tattoo that looks far worse than it did prior to coming here. I paid $1800 for 4 treatments. I used 2 and neither worked, only made matters worse. They only will refund $600 of the unused $900, no refunds for the 2 treatments that didn’t work/caused serious scarring. Now I’m paying to see a dermatologist and next week a consultation for laser treatment for the scarring.
I really hate to leave negative reviews for places but please do more research than I did prior to considering this route. Unfortunately, I decided to read all of the Reddit reviews AFTER the fact and per reviews it’s not uncommon for this to happen.
Michelle is amazing!!! She makes you feel so comfortable through the entire process and is there to answer any questions anytime you need! I would definitely recommend Tatt2Away and Michelle!!
Michelle is amazing!! Answers all your questions and makes you feel comfortable!
Michelle is an absolute delight. She is super clean and very professional. Great conversationalist which helps to destract from any discomfort during the procedure.
I am absolutely so happy with my tat removal. Wonderful place with a wonderful tech. So glad I found this place.
Michelle is awesome! She makes the whole experience so much easier and is really sweet

Michelle did an amazing job making me feel comfortable and was very informative about the tattoo removal process! She will make you feel like family! I appreciate her kindness and funny vibes! I will be recommending her in the future!
Michelle treated me with respect and was extremely knowledgeable about the removal process.  I have full faith in her capabilities in my upcoming treatments

Michelle is wonderful. I’ve done tatt2away with other techs, I’ve done laser, etc. and this was my favorite removal experience. super fast, amazing attention to detail, and genuinely seems to really care about giving the best results. thank you!!
Michelle was great, always takes great care of me!

I love this location. Michelle is very informative and thorough. My session went by very quickly and smoothly and as my skin is healing, I see that this definitely is the way to go for tattoo removal 10 and 10 recommend Michelle and her services!!!
Michelle is absolutely amazing! Very kind and thorough with helping understand the entire process. She was so efficient with the treatment it was shocking how fast it went.

Excellent experience, from scheduling to treatment. The staff is so kind and committed to successful treatment while keeping your skin healthy. Michelle was wonderful with explaining the process and post treatment care. She is an expert at providing the service and managing recovery expectations.

Located IN Salon Suites, great location and secure.
Michelle is the best!!! Super fast and easy

Michelle is amazing! She made me feel so comfortable during the whole process of the procedure, as well as afterwards. I would highly recommend Michelle at Tatt2Away. Can’t wait to see the final results! 😊
Michelle is great!! So kind, personable, and professional (:

Michelle was amazing during my Tatt2Away appointment! She made me feel super comfortable during the treatment as well as after in regards to reaching out to her with questions/concerns. Love her and Tatt2Away!!!

Wow! I came in today for a consultation with Michelle (who was an absolute gem) to look more into removing cosmetic tattooed freckles. I love that she was openly honest about the process and that the procedure was maybe not a good fit for my skin type instead of sweet-talking me into buying her services. She has countless years of experience in working with cosmetic aesthetics and referred me to probably my next best solution; just know that you’re in the best hands coming to this place and you will be given honest feedback about your removal. Thanks again, Michelle!!!
Don't trust the 1 star reviews. The new technician is highly knowledgeable and has less issues compared to the old technician.

I had Michelle for my second appointment and she was ABSOLUTELY amazing! She was very nice, thorough, professional, and made sure that I was doing ok throughout the procedure. The person I had before took a whole hour and Michelle did it in 20 minutes which was so great. My tattoo is on my neck and into my hairline so, it's a very sensitive area and the quicker the better. My pain tolerance only lasts so long. I am so happy I had her. She was very friendly and made sure I understood after care instructions and even wanted me to send her pictures of my healing process, when the other lady (that did my first session) did not. I love this company and what they are doing to help people that have tattoos they need to get rid of. Thank you Michelle!

Ever since Michelle took over my treatment, it's been great! She really cares and checks up on me through out the appointment. Her instructions are written out and easy to follow for after care. Really the best!

I’m so happy I went with Tatt2Away In Austin. This process has been so easy and the technician Michelle is so knowledgeable and sweet as pie. She made me feel at home and in good hands. I will recommend Tatt2Away to anyone. Trust the process!!

Amazing results, my husband began with laser removal, what a waste of time and money. Michelle in Austin has done such an amazing job, literally no ink left! Totally worth the trip once a month or so from Houston! We wouldn't go anywhere else, she’s a total pro! Thanks Michelle!

First time getting my tattoos removed and I’m so glad I decided to go with this company. Not only is the technique and process natural, but the technician (Michelle) is great and made me feel comfortable all the way from my consultation to my first session. I’d absolutely recommend Tatt2Away to my friends and family. Thank you again Michelle!

My experience with Tatt2Away was exceptional from start to finish. After three previous sessions at different locations in previous years, I found this session to be the most personable and fulfilling. Michelle's professionalism and warm demeanor truly set her apart. Her gift is more than just skin care and is appreciated.

This journey has been a long one due to getting laser tattoo removal first. I was dealing with the pain from the laser, and the high cost, and the results weren't what I expected or was told. My cousin told me about Tatt2away so I gave them a go. I love that their method is much less painful than when you get the right tattoo and it costs less because you need fewer sessions. The team was really nice, friendly, educated, and professional. I'm really thankful for the removal results and the customer service I strongly recommend!

I got a tattoo that I love but it's just bigger than what I would like for it to be. I went with Tatt2away bc of the more natural approach. Michelle is such a sweet, kind, and thoughtful person. She answered all my questions. I felt comfortable and opened up to her about my picking and scratching coping mechanism. She told me it would be a waste of money if I picked at the scabs and she wouldn't do the treatment if I felt like I wouldn't refrain from it. To have someone so honest means a lot to me.
The treatment -- it really isn't as bad as getting the tattoo -- the anticipation is worst.
I've done 1 treatment and it really just feels like a bad sunburn. I honestly thought it was going to look and feel a lot worst than what it is so far. I will keep y'all updated. 😊💗
Photos are initial, 24 hours after, and 48 hours after.

I recently discovered that I've developed an allergy to my own tattoo ink. It's been a long hard road, months of trying to figure out what's going on, and being referred from PCP, to Dermatology, to Allergist. Considering my situation, the thought of laser was especially not appealing. In fact, my Allergist warned that it may send me into shock, disbursing the ink throughout my body..

I had never even heard of T2A before all this (how??), but they have been so helpful. They scheduled a free consult, heard out my concerns, took notes of all my allergies, and even spoke to my Allergist to ensure they were being careful and considerate. They took their time and weren't just in a rush to get me on the books, taking my money even if it may not be good for me in my specific situation. You know?

Michelle has been great (everyone has). It was so good getting to meet her, the place was clean and organized, I got plenty of resource and information regarding care before/during/after, and she's been keeping in contact to make sure things are going well. I feel very fortunate to have even had this option so close to me.

Thank you for what you do. I'm sure you can't always guarantee how any given body will handle these things, but from my experience, I appreciate all of your time, attention to detail, and genuine care. Sincerely.

My Tatt2Away experience was amazing, thanks to Michelle. She truly knows what she’s doing and made the entire process so much better. The studio was impeccably clean, and from the moment I walked in, I knew I was in for a great experience. Michelle is incredibly knowledgeable and informative, which made me feel very safe and comfortable. I highly recommend her services and will booking my next appointment with her again!

I do not recommend this company for tattoo removal. My first experience was on March 22nd and the technician, Maggie, was absolutely amazing. She took the time to explain the process to me and reassure me of any fears I had going in. She was very gentle, and pleasant and showed she cared not only about my tattoo horrible story, but the integrity of my skin. I had 2 services with her and each time was better than the last!
However, I’ve since tried to rebook Maggie and have sadly been informed that she is no longer employed there. I did receive treatment from one other technician since Maggie’s departure and I must say, my skin is swollen, painful and I fear I may walk away from this session with scars which was never a concern before. The woman that worked on me was not very nice, quick with the process and seemed like she could care less about the integrity of my skin and if I were to scar.
As a licensed esthetician in the service industry, I know a good worker when I see one and Maggie was that, the other lady, who I didn’t care to remember her name of, was not. I unfortunately will not be returning as I do worry about my skin health and I do not feel valued as a customer.

Firstly let me say that Maggie who used to work at Tatt2away was amazing! She took great care of me and was very careful with my skin concerns! She was very gentle and the treatment did not hurt at all or scar. However the lady they sent in from corporate who also worked on me was horrible. With her the treatment was painful and left a horrible scar!! Along with that she was very rude and dismissive of any concerns I had. It’s really upsetting to see a company prioritising employees that do not care for the customers and push treatments they are not comfortable with it. I felt my concerns were dismissed and I was belittled. If Maggie was still with Tatt2away I would be so happy to continue treatment but unfortunately I do not trust the judgement of this company. They care about profits over the effectiveness of the treatment, they lie about scaring risks. It’s a shame but I would not go here:(

Do not get this treatment. I went in for my first treatment and was in the most excruciating pain I had ever been in, no, it does not “Feel like a tattoo gun”. The healing was horrible. My arm was so swollen. I could not see my elbow for about three days. I have never had scar prone skin, and I started to form a few keloids and got concerned, I ended up reaching out to a dermatologist, who highly advised it gets going to another treatment Because the body is not meant to endure this multiple times. This company falsely advertises results, and I have tried for going on two weeks now to reach out to the manager and have gotten one email back asking to set up a time to meet, which she did not even respond back to meet with me the day i had suggested. I am very upset and feel completely bamboozled.

Absolutely loved Maggie ! She is professional, kind and a very caring person.
I can't wait to return for my next treatment. I highly recommend her. The office was immaculate and I felt very comfortable!

I am currently in the process of removing my tattoo. Natalia has been taking such great care of me. She instructs me on after care anytime I have questions or forget without hesitation. She really cares about cleanliness and is very nice. She makes sure I am comfortable in her chair and that my needs are met first. She even provides drinks and snacks to make sure I’m fed. Natalia also knows a lot about skin care and is always happy to share what she knows to insure I benefit. It is because of her knowledge that my healing process is always swift. I’ll be happy to provide photos of my progress even though we have more sessions it’s definitely a process especially with a larger tattoo like mine. But the ink is completely gone in the spots she’s worked on. It’s like ink was never there. Creating smaller scabs to prevent scarring is a very effective process that inkOUT uses and most of them come from a medical background. Also it hurts no more than getting the tattoo and I barely feel a thing when they use numbing cream. Natalia definitely goes above and beyond to not only make she I’m healing but to make sure I’m comfortable and not in pain. I’m glad she’s working with me because she is so caring.

Natalia is amazing and knowledgeable, attentive and result oriented. She takes her time, makes sure you’re comfortable and very fast with her services so she’ll finish before the numbing wears off! 10/10
Natalia was very kind and professional. She did an excellent job with my InkOut session and I appreciated her consideration for my comfort through the whole process.
Mandy’s really cool had a great experience and results by far.

I had a fantastic experience with Mandy at Tatt2Away. From the first consultation to my next session, she was knowledgeable, caring, and professional. She took the time to explain each step of the process, making sure I felt comfortable and informed. Amazing results!!!
Great service, very knowledgeable and thorough

Mandy was incredibly knowledgeable about both laser tattoo removal and the Tatt2Away method. She took the time to explain the differences between the two processes, which really helped me make an informed decision. Mandy’s friendly and personable demeanor made me feel comfortable throughout the process, and the time passed quickly during my first session. I highly recommend her!

I met with Mandy today for a consultation for a tattoo on my wrist. She explained everything thoroughly and I appreciated how approachable she was from start to finish. Since she is also trained in laser tattoo removal she was able to answer questions I had about both treatment methods. I will be starting treatments once I'm able to commit proper time to the aftercare.

PROS: Great results! Mandy makes sure I’m comfortable every session! It’s faster and more efficient than laser removal. Would recommend to everyone!

CONS: can be very painful/uncomfortable, so make sure you numb the skin before the session

Mandy was fantastic! Both knowledgeable and approachable, she explained how the various treatment processes work and after reviewing my history (I’ve had numerous laser treatments in the past), we decided that Tatt2away was not the best option for me. She could’ve easily persuaded me to take a treatment but focused on what was best for me and my situation. I very much appreciate that!!

I can’t express enough how thrilled I am with my experience at Tat2Away, specifically with Mandy. From start to finish, Mandy exhibited the utmost professionalism, skill, and compassion, making my tattoo removal journey an absolute breeze.

First and foremost, Mandy’s expertise in tattoo removal is unparalleled. She took the time to thoroughly explain the process, answering all of my questions and alleviating any concerns I had. Her meticulous approach instilled confidence in me from the get-go.

Throughout each session, Mandy’s attention to detail was evident. She ensured that I was comfortable and informed every step of the way, making the process surprisingly comfortable. Her gentle demeanor and reassuring presence truly made a difference, especially during those initial sessions when I was a bit apprehensive.

Moreover, the results speak for themselves. Thanks to Mandy’s skillful technique and dedication, my tattoo has faded significantly with each session, exceeding my expectations. I’m beyond grateful for her expertise and the incredible results she has achieved.

Beyond her technical proficiency, Mandy’s empathy and kindness truly set her apart. She genuinely cares about her clients and goes above and beyond to make them feel valued and supported throughout the entire process. Her warmth and positivity made what could have been a daunting experience incredibly positive and empowering.

In conclusion, I wholeheartedly recommend Mandy at Tat2Away for anyone considering tattoo removal. Not only is she a master of her craft, but she’s also a wonderful person who genuinely cares about her clients’ well-being. Thank you, Mandy, for making this journey so rewarding. You’ve gained a lifelong fan in me!

If anyone is skeptical of this process or this company, please reach out to me personally, and I would be happy to give more detail

This company's technology looks amazing, and to its credit it may very well be a wonderful thing, HOWEVER, my personal experience with the clinic has convinced me that this is a very disorganized company, and furthermore one whose moral compass in terms of rational decision making is not skewed in a direction I admire.

After some initial phone tag, I was able to book an appointment for a first treatment with this clinic some weeks ago. However, because of the fact that I chose to be completely honest with my medical history at the time and disclosed that I believe I have a mild hypermobility syndrome (something I certainly could have kept secret if I’d known the trouble it would cause), my appointment was abruptly cancelled by the upper management due to (I would say extremely paranoid) concerns about liability issues. Please note, nothing on the website currently mentions that folks with a hypermobility disorder will be summarily rejected from treatment!!

Notably, I was not given any kind of say during this cancellation process. What irked me the most was I was not allowed to be part of any kind of conversation with management/the medical staff, despite the fact that this was a session that had been PROMISED to me and already BOOKED! And all this despite the fact that the tech who I had initially talked to said she was personally confident in and happy to give me the procedure despite the liability concerns, which she agreed were over the top given that I not only did not mind the idea of scarring, I actually thought it sounded cool were it to occur (I am a fan of the art form of scarification) and was willing to sign any kind of waiver to get the procedure done.

Finally, it was extremely puzzling and upsetting to me that my appointment was cancelled essentially behind my back and the only notification I got of the cancellation was an extremely vague text message saying “I spoke with our medical staff and just had a few things I wanted to touch base with you on.” Well, I had no idea what news was waiting in store for me, I figured the “few things” were just bureaucratic details, but I indeed tried calling back for several days in a row after this message. However, I was met with the answering machine each time (it seems like their phones are generally understaffed), and there was never any more personalized follow up from the clinic’s side. In other words, *I* had to chase THEM to finally get the confirmation that my appointment had indeed been cancelled since they didn’t have the courage(?)/common sense to tell me up front in the text they sent??? So, if I had not diligently followed up in this manner, I very well could have showed up to my appointment only to be told ON THE SPOT that my session had been cancelled without my knowledge or approval – and keep in mind, I am not living in Chicago full time right now so I was building my entire travel schedule around this one appointment.

Finally – and this is where it gets truly hilarious – weeks after the snafu with my cancelled appointment, I get a “follow up” text to an old message I had sent before scheduling the appointment saying “sorry this message got buried, when would you like to continue the conversation about booking?” I am no longer truly upset and can laugh about this now, but this company obviously needs to do some serious work in terms of client communications, PR, and staying on top of patient history.

Furthermore, it is unfortunately apparently so obsessed about liability issues that it can’t make a rational exception to take on a sane adult client in good faith (although I guess that’s the age we live in, thanks #america). It also seems to be totally insensitive to the psychological damage and upset it might be causing a prospective (and then later rejected) client by the snowball effect of such vague, contradictory, and misguided messages! Sorry, Tatt2Away, I wanted to love you - but come on, this is basic client rapport skills, 101!
Getting a tattoo removed is not fun, or easy, but Brittany has been really easy to work with and is fast, professional and friendly.
Britney  is absolutely amazing.  She is very professional explaining and answering  any questions I may have.  I have one more treatment and would recommend Britney and the Draper location.
The results speak for itself. I have had a few treatments and the tattoo is fading away,
Had a great consultation with Britney. She answered all my questions and made me feel really comfortable with the treatment process.

Britney was fantastic, very professional and helpful.
Everything is very clean and well kept.
I will say the removal process was a little more painful than I expected (I thought it would be similar to getting the tattoo).
I look forward to seeing the progress of my removal.

STAY AWAY!! I did two sessions in 2022 and I still have the SCARS! These people mutilated my body and should not be in business. I followed all of the aftercare instructions perfectly and now I will have to pay hundreds of dollars to try n fix what they did to me. I have had random people come up to me and tell me they also scarred from this treatment! Strangers come up to me everywhere I go and ask about my arm it is embarrassing!! Do not trust them! This photo is what it looks like now, I do not want anyone else to go through this.

Absolutely horrible experience. A close family member went here for tattoo removal and was left with severe scarring despite following every single aftercare instruction exactly as directed.

This procedure was significantly more painful than professional laser removal, yet delivered far worse results. Instead of fading the tattoo, it caused lasting damage that now requires laser treatment to fix the harm done here.

If you’re considering tattoo removal, do yourself a favor and look elsewhere. Read the other reviews carefully and consult a licensed laser removal provider instead. This place caused permanent consequences that could have been avoided.

AVOID TATT2AWAY. My first and only session was Spring 2022. After proper aftercare and nearly four years later, the ink is mostly gone in the treated spots but I am also left with some hypertrophic scars from the procedure. If I were to continue with the removal process for the entire tattoo, I would choose laser or some other method, especially since its on my finger which has more sensitive and thinner skin more prone to scarring. Overall not impressed with the long-term results and wish I did more research before spending my money here. (The last photo was taken April 22, 2022, sometime after the procedure, the first two photos are fully healed December 2025)
I regret going to Tatt2away more than getting the original tattoo. They mutilate you, end of story.

It’s always a lovely experience with Jazz and Britney. They both offer such a warm and welcoming environment. I’m so pleased with the results of my tattoo removal so far, and would recommend them to anyone looking into tattoo removal!
Brittney, the current Draper technician, is great! This technology is much more streamlined, effective, and therapeutic for the skin than traditional laser.
Great experience! Very friendly!
Britney was very helpful in my tattoo removal process. she also was able to answer questions about remaining payments I had.

I had my 3rd treatment with Britney P yesterday. She was so kind and made sure I was comfortable, my appointment was a breeze with minimal pain. I think the important thing to remember is that this process takes time, but it works. Seeing my ink disappear has been so healing for me. Thanks Britney and Tatt2away!

Finished the first session with Britney. She was on time and very professional. Despite my willingness to do whatever was asked of me, Britney was extremely attentive and helpful. I highly recommend this tattoo removal site!

I just had my 4th session with Britney Pham and I am very happy with how things are going! Britney made me feel very comfortable and made sure all of my questions were answered before I left. I’m very pleased!
Nice, comfortable space, explained aftercare in simple terms, good attention to detail.

***responding to their response…
It is simply not true that they have received no response from me. I text them on March 11th and after not hearing back, I sent a bubble “?”  To my text about scarring. After several days I received a text that I will have to come in and asked what time works best, which was just a few days ago. So the fact that they are saying they have made several attempts and haven't received a response is just simply not true.
Also them saying the pictures I attached are the ones showing irritations is also false. I didn’t even post those pictures original, I now have irritated photos posted. The pictures I posted are 2 months past my last appt. I have taken extremely good care of the wound (cause that is what it is) and the pictures are after all that extra care. That is the pictures of it healed! Which is why I text them about the scarring. You shouldn’t have to use tegaderm to not have scarring. This “tattoo removal” will scar you!

DO NOT get tattoo removal here! You will be left with a permanent scar where your tattoo was.

It’s appalling that this company is still operating. Their practices are not just unethical, but downright harmful. They are knowingly scarring their clients and should be shut down immediately! Avoid this company at all costs!

And for those that are thinking that I am just an angry customer and that there are enough good reviews to give it a try…I would encourage you to notice that none of the “good” reviews have before and after pictures. How would anyone give a good review for being permanently scarred??

These pics show the different stages. I have had 3 treatments and will never go back. This is the scar I am left with. 😖😔😡

Did two treatments - with little changes after each session. Was charged $1000 for two sessions. It is $500 per session. It would probably take 10+ sessions to remove at this rate. Laser is cheaper and much faster than the 3-hour painful appointments.

I was also ghosted with no response during what was supposed to be my follow-up for 1 whole month before I was told my person had left the company. Just not a good experience, unfortunately all around. 10+ hours wasted. Lots of pain and 1k out of money with the entire tattoo still there... :(

My experience at Tatt2away here in Draper has been wonderful! I was nervous at first but, with the help of Mandy Morrell, the process of getting my tattoo removed has been stress free and very exciting! I am very happy with the outcome so far and was super excited to see the ink be removed from my skin in one of the scabs that fell off! It’s so cool to see the healing and the progress. I’m grateful I found tatt2away and for the kindness and help that Mandy has shown me. Thank you!

This is an excellent way to get a better tattoo removal than laser. It’s fairly quick and easy and jazz is super professional and skilled. Obviously tattoo removal doesn’t feel amazing no matter what but I still have a good time chatting with jazz and fully trust her work.

Absolute worst place. My first appointment, Jazz forgot to give me her number after telling me to send her pictures of how my tattoo removal was healing in the next few days. I was calling the office with questions and trying to get her number, and no one answered. It wasn’t until she contacted me over a month later, saying she needed to do our next visit over the phone because she wasn’t going to be in the office, that i finally got her number. Setting up appointments afterwards was horrible, and took forever to actually get a response no matter how many times I called and texted. The whole process was taking so much longer than necessary. Eventually she got some help, but by then I had decided I was done with her forgetfulness and unprofessionalism. It’s not worth it. Get laser or a tattoo cover up honestly. By far the worst experience. No questions were answered, always rushed, and it was a WASTE.
Mandy was awesome! She explained everything and was very nice in helping me feel comfortable. Tattoo removal was smooth and seamless.

I used this service to remove my eyebrow Microblading. I would not recommend it. I only went through with one of the two treatments, as the healing was so long, and I had vertical striped scabs that were very obvious. The striped scabs were to be expected, but the healing time was longer than expected. It also didn’t fully remove the ink in any of the strips that were treated. I also have slight scarring (pink, depressed skin). I started laser treatment today, and this seems like a much better and safer approach. I also contacted Tatt2away to ask for a partial refund since it didn’t remove my ink, and I wouldn’t be going through with the second prepaid treatment. I understand I signed a contract, but it would be good business practice and customer service to offer partial (half) refund.

I started my journey with Tatt2Away just two days ago and from the consultation to now I am completely impressed with the professionalism of Mandy Morrell who was my aesthetician. She is incredibly educated and was very kind to me. The office is EXTREMELY clean which is always a plus. I’m looking forward to our next session and for someone who doesn’t like lasers this was the place for me and I highly recommend it if you are looking to remove tattoos. The process is really exciting and physically I even feel better since my first session. Again, this is a great place to go if you are really serious about removing tattoos and Mandy Morrell is Amazing! Thank you Tatt2Away 💕
Very personable, clean and helpful
Jazz is extremely knowledgeable and explains the procedure in a way that is easy to understand.

This tattoo removal process is really interesting.  Tons of tiny little holes that heal the tattoo ink off your body.  I found the procedure to be pretty painless, definitely less than getting the tattoo.  The after care is long and tedious, but what do you expect from a removal?  I stuck to the letter on the aftercare and have clean, new, unscarred skin.  It works!  Also, better than burning yourself with a laser!  Jazz is fun and the shop is clean.  I recommend.

Tatt2away completely mutilated by 18 year olds arm. She went back to the clinic and they said she was having a “reaction”. After several visits with the dermatologist the doctor confirmed that it wasn’t a reaction, it was a completely botched tattoo removal that has left her with extreme keloid scars on her whole arm. The staff did not try to help her or offer her a refund or anything! Just a completely unconcerned well, your body is reacting. What an inhumane response to hurting such a young one so badly. She is undergoing medical treatment from the damage they caused but she will ultimately be scarred for life. For anyone considering this clinic I would stay well away. The damage they caused is severe and their unconcerned attitude regarding how badly they hurt her and botched the job shows TERRIBLE ethics. This photo is months post treatment. She will have these hard raised scars for life. It also seems like the business is flagging and removing negative reviews as this review is no longer publicly available. Wow.
Jazz is amazing, so professional, honest and just great to work with.

This process is amazing and I love how safe it is! I’m so glad Tatt2Away provides a safe and non toxic way of removing unwanted tattoos! Jazz was incredible and so knowledgeable! I can’t recommend Tatt2Away enough!
Jazz is incredible! Gave me so much helpful advice and the removal itself was practically painless.
Jazz is amazing at what she does and made me feel completely comfortable while she was working on me, highly recommend her to anyone looking for tattoo removal!
Not for melanin rich or scar prone skin. Left huge raised scars covering my arm.

Honestly such an amazing experience. Jazz helped so much and was very well informed on everything she was doing. I was nervous because the tattoo I have is older and my skin had scarred over. She reassured me about the pain and the procedure was less painful than when I got the tattoo. I look forward to finishing up this process with her.

Jazz is simply the best! Her studio space is very clean. She is extremely knowledgeable and will set you up on the perfect path for your tattoo removal. I am SO happy I found her before going through any more laser treatments.

I was very skeptical at trying this process at first, but that changed quickly after my first treatment. The process was and is very easy and Jazz is amazing and makes you feel right at home like you are part of the family. I can't wait for my next appointment and I'm excited to see the results.

I'm starting my process to remove a tattoo. The attention has been amazing, Jazz is incredibly kind and explains very well all the steps that I need to do to get a successful treatment. She is very professional and always willing to resolve all my doubts.
Thanks.

Jazz was sensational!  She is excellent at her craft, and it's comforting to know she has a nursing background. She numbed my arm very well so I didn't feel much pain at all!  Jazz also has cool taste I'm music, her office has a chill vibe and she was able to get the job done effectively while having lighthearted conversation the entire time.   Tattoo removals don't sound like a fun experience, but if Jazz is doing the job, I know I can look forward to my next treatment.   Jazz rocks!

Jazz is very professional and she makes sure you understand how everything works. My tattoo has left a lot of scar tissue and was also very deep. A lot of my tattoo has been removed and my scar tissue is also not as bad it was which is very surprising. It’s definitely flattened it out a lot. I’m very happy with the results I’m getting. So thank you jazz.
Jazz is very professional and educates you about every aspect of the process!
Jazz was knowledgeable and great. Couldn't ask for a better treatment.
Jazz is great. She took the time to put me at ease and is very personable. I highly recommend her.

On my 4th treatment.  The sessions are making my tattoo dissappear. I voukdnt be happier with how it's going. Jazz is my technician and she makes every meeting aersome. Definitely continuing till it's gone!

Had tattoo removal performed by Jazz. Worked out great  and is really helping to get my unwanted tattoo gone over time. Jazz is great and really helped me through the process and the aftercare. Gave great instructions and is very caring and concerned about my welfare. Would recommend to someone looking to remove an unwanted tattoo.
Awesome experience. Had my first treatment today and can't wait for my next! Jazz is very friendly and awesome. Definitely looking forward to my next session!

Jazz, was very professional and made sure that I understood all the information she had given me on the process of removal of the tattoo.
The procedure wasn’t painful just a bit uncomfortable and I highly recommend Jazz to do the removals.
I have had nothing but good experiences and things to say about jazz and this company. She has been so kind and helping me get rid of my tattoo! Highly recommended
Did an amazing job! Great bedside manners. Super friendly

Jazz is incredible to work with, she is extremely knowledgeable in her field and went above and beyond to help answer all my questions, as well as kind and personable. Long sessions can sometimes mean long awkward silence  but not with Jazz:) I could chat with her all day!  She made me comfortable and calm like I was with an old friend. 10/10 experience.

Jazz Wilkey has been such a delight to work with on my tattoo removal! She is always willing to answer any questions I have about my own removal process and information all around! I am grateful to have come across such a patient team, and I recommend Tatt2Away to anyone looking for a safe way to remove their tattoos!
Jazz is the sweetest lady ever. she made me feel so comfortable during my appointment, she is so personable and is the very best!

I have currently had my first session with Jazz done and I’m about 4 weeks into my healing process. The little scabs have all come off and I can see this beautifully pink healthy ink free skin underneath! I’m excited to see what happens after number 2!
Jazz is a delightful human! I really enjoyed the time we got to spend together doing my appointment. She’s super knowledgeable and has zero problem with any questions!

I had a great experience through and through with Idalia! She was very informative and helpful with explaining the process. We did complete a test spot and I had a great result!  I have been working with Cheri since Idalia left (maybe close to a year now) and she is absolutely AMAZING!! So sweet, so knowledgeable, and great with communication. I canNOT wait until this tattoo is gone and I know she will make sure of it!!
Wonderful ladies to work with!!

Had the pleasure of working with Idalia on my tattoo removal and I just want to say that this was the best experience I could have asked for. I imagined it would be painful like laser but it did not hurt at all. It was a bit uncomfortable but certainly not worse than getting a tattoo. The studio is clean and located in Houston so the drive wasn't bad from the River Oaks area. I have already recommended inkout to several family members. Inkout is awesome!!! Loving my results!!

I love this location! I’ve had this treatment done a few times before and I’ve been waiting for one to open nearby! The technicians are amazing, she walked me through the whole process it was easy peezy! I would recommend to anyone searching for tattoo removal especially as an alternative to laser.
Ms. Idalia and Michelle were kind and very professional, it felt like we had been going there for years and the service was amazing!

Idalia was very sweet and did a great job working on my tattoo removal. We are one session in and I’m excited to see how the process progresses. This is a great location and I’m excited that this removal option has moved to the Houston area as I used to have to drive to Austin for it.
Very poor customer service! Hung up on me as I was inquiring about their services
